textByHash.2446d4fe5ea5dffd8804801b1ba99a444cc2462f: Well, you're clearly a noob then.
textByHash.3f8ab8f25e4bc0164029540d1a063e0f9a915e87: Pfft,I'm level 50 Ranged. Over half-way to 99, getting over there will be a breeze.
textByHash.40e28bf68cdb203baece1a122b9f5819f2938141: Well, I made my way to Morytania in search of a place called the Ba... Barlows? I've heard it's a great way to earn gold.
textByHash.7b3586fa9594a7be985a193a9519b7cf89ff865f: The weird hooded guy at the top said that if I get him some hollow marks, he'll help me escape.
textByHash.8e22abbf9c8f601b7df44b25a4ab2e7826d500a1: Maybe you do with that attitude.
textByHash.a75bad3380987e642bd9f90fd09e806a59a2ae2f: So, can I borrow a grapple?
textByHash.b36cde32827ba35883fe25348f285f483f46355f: Yeah, that's what I said. Don't you listen?
textByHash.b91ae5b25302716f349fee982b7153a6f30eb641: Anyways, I got lost on the way here and was abducted by some vampyres! However, I'm so sneaky I managed to escape and find this place.
textByHash.cacdcc7d529fe15b7c3ec32b8111399d40004485: I need it to grapple to that pillar over there and get some treasure of course. What else could I need it for?
textByHash.d6bd3f5287032edd173be15602fc6b76b42c8131: Hey there! Do you have a grapple I can borrow?
textByHash.efc97d2a408795d93da6ec810143c078d24f7be6: Keep your grapple then noob. I can make that jump without it anyway.
